titleStmt.title: SII 41.62: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 62. (A.R. No. 61 of 1905.) Madurai, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the pillars in the second story of the east gōpura of the Sundaraēśvara temple at Madura.

summary.p: Incomplete. After the eulogy portion, only the Brahmadēyam Cōlāntakac-caturvētimaṅgalam in Pākanūr-kūam is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tacoḷapatiyeṉṉum
nāmamumtoṉṉakarum
mīḷavaḻaṅkiviṭaikuṭu
ttuviṭṭaruḷiōtakkaṭalu
mpārilventarkiḷai
kkuṟṟavetaṅkaḷ
tīṟkuṅkaṭavuḷiva
ṉeṉṟeṇṇi
ttaḷaiyuṟṟa
ṭaiyātārtaṇ
ṭaliṭaimeṉki
ḷaiyuṟṟaṉamuḻu
B

tuṅ keṭṭaruḷeṉṟet
ti vaṇaṅkum vaṭakoṅ
kaṉ ciṟaimiḷa veṇṭiṉa ka
ṇaṅkoḷiru tirutto
ḷ mālai kaḻitel vaḻaṅ
kiyaruḷiya piṉ maṟṟoru nā
ḷ paṟṟār muḻaṅku muraica
k kaṭaṟṟāṉai muṉpu In
teṉ kaṇaṅkaḷ polu
ṅ kiḷaitta teṉṟaṇaik
kaḻit teṉkoṅkaṉ va
C

ntiṭṭateṇṭalukkumin
poṅkaccāttiyavāpara
ṇantakkateṉavaḻaṅki
yārttaperunaṇpiṉava
ṉciṟaiyumviṭṭuttiru
mālumnāṉmukaṉuñ
cevikkacceṅkaṭakkumā
kaḷiṟṟil varumukak kaṭavuḷe
ṉamāṭamaturaiyiltāṉ
pontapuvaṉiyilekūṭa
yirukoṅkaraiyuṅkumpi
ṭṭukoṇṭavarkkut tol
D

laippuvikkumpiṇaṅ
kāmaltāṉcoṉṉa
vellaikkaṇiṟkayicai
vatiṭṭeṟkakoṇṭa
vvāṟeceyyātoḻi
yiliyapaṉukku pavev
velviruntākkutum
maiyeṉaviṭṭaruḷi
muṉṉamnamakkumu
ṭivaḻaṅkuñce
vaṭikkiḻiṉṉam
vaḻipaṭuvomeṉ
ṉātupiṉṉoru
E

nāḷ kāvaleṉatu puṉa
ṉāṭeṉuṅ kaḷiyāle va
letir koḷḷātiṟai
maṟutta ceṉṉiviruntu
ciyum peraṇiyum Okkac cu
ruṇṭotuṅka vāciyum
vāraṇamum terumaṭaṟ karuvi
k kālāḷum veṭṭuṇṇa
kkaṇṭu payaṅkaikkoṇ
velā valaiyattu viḻ
ntavaṉ poy mey naṭuva
F

ka vamparuntumākat taṭame
ṇṭarikar kuṭal vemparuntum
peyumiruntuṇṇa vakkaḷa
ttaṭa lāṉaiyil veṇmarup
puṅ kaiyyuṅ kuṟaitte
ṅkaḷ miṉavaṟku pākuṭamā
meṉṟuṇ virar koḷmāka
mukaṭu taṭavi maḻaitarukkuṅ
kākaneṭum pantalkavantanti
ṉāṭavai kūkaiyiṉ pāṭalu
ṅ kaṇṭuṅ keṭṭuṅ kaḷit
tiṭṭa Uṭalk karuṅkūntal ve
G

ḷḷeyiṟṟiccevvāy
perucūlakkaiyval
lipalikoḷkaveṉavā
ḻttiveṉṟupakaiyiṉ
mikaiyoḻiyaventalaṟa
kkoṉṟuñciṉantaṇiyā
kkoṟṟaneṭuvāḷ ya
ceṅkuṟuti niriṟṟoḷi
ceytu tecampula
ttuveṇkavaṭi
vicciyaviramuḻute
ṭuttuppāṭumpara
H

ṇi taṉ pārventar keṭṭupi
kkavāṭun tirumañcaṇaniril
maṇaṅkuḷira vāṅkavaṉ ti
ṇai kaṭṭaṇattil kaṟputamaṟkaṟa
ṇā Ōṅmurimaik kuḻāmoru
ṅkuṭaṉe kaikkoṇṭu muri
maṇippaṭṭaṅkaṭṭi muṭicūṭṭi mā
rpilaṇaittu Ayaṉava
l mukaṟṟeviyeṉap
per kuṭutta vañcimutalā
ṉa peyvaḷaiyār poṅ
I

kupuṉal kumpa mutalāya
var pukaḻ maṅkaḷeṭṭu ma
ṇikkaittalat tenti
kkoṭikkoṇṭa neṟṟi
tal kopurañcūḻ muṭiko
ṇṭa coḻapuramaṇṭapattup
pukkut ticai toṟuñce
mpon ceyatanpam nāṭ
ṭi vijaiyāpiṣekam
J

paṇṇiyaruḷiceyta
vākaik kativēl
vaṭaventar tam pāta
m mekattaḷaiyaṇiya
virakkaḻalaṇintu vi
ḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi vira
simhāsaṉattu viḷa
ṅkeḻukavariyiru
maruṅkacaippa
kkaṭaleṉa muḻa
ṅkuṅ kaḷi nalla
yāṉai vaṭapula
ventar maṇippuya
K.

mpiriyā Ilakkuṭaiya
rivayar toḻutu naṉṟet
tum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷo
ṭum viṟṟaruḷiya śrīkōmā
ṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa
ccakkaravattikaḷ coṉā
ṭu koṇṭu muṭi koṇ
ṭa coḻapurattu virāvi
bhiṣEkamum vijaiyā
nbhiṣēkamum paṇṇi
yaruḷiya śrī sundarapāṇṭi
L.

yatevaṟkuyāṇṭu 10 5
āvatu dhanunāyaṟṟu A
parapakṣattu trayOda
śiyumcevvāykkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa viśā
kattu nāḷ pākaṉūrk
kūṟṟattu brahmadeya
m śrīcoḷāntakac
Digital edition of SII 41.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
